content/memo.搬家当晚把小灯放在地上: On the night of moving, put the small lamp on the ground
content/memo.屋里还堆着箱子: There are still boxes piled up in the house
content/memo.我们用纸箱当桌子: We use cardboard boxes as tables
content/memo.第二天起床才觉得正式住进来: When I woke up the next day, I felt like I had officially moved in.
content/memo.小城远行: A trip to a small town
content/memo.临时决定去海边小城: I temporarily decided to go to a seaside town
content/memo.先在站前吃了热豆浆: I ate hot soy milk in front of the station first
content/memo.海风把帽子吹得东倒西歪: The sea breeze blew the hat around
content/memo.回来时把车票夹进钱包: Put the ticket in your wallet when you come back
content/memo.晚上回到常走的路口: Go back to your usual intersection at night
content/memo.店名换了两次: The store name has been changed twice
content/memo.站了一会儿才走: He stood for a while before leaving
content/memo.下雨时躲进旧书店: Hiding in a used bookstore when it rains
content/memo.门口的小铃一直响: The little bell at the door keeps ringing
content/memo.挑了本二手散文: I picked up a second-hand prose book
content/memo.在店里看了几页: I read a few pages in the store
content/memo.老板用旧报纸包书: The boss wraps books in old newspapers
content/memo.屋里却安静得能听见雨声: The house was so quiet that I could hear the rain
content/memo.后来把备用蜡烛补齐: Later, I added the spare candles
content/memo.整理相册时挑两张旧照片放在同一相框里: When organizing photo albums, pick two old photos and put them in the same frame
content/memo.早上光线刚好: The light is just right in the morning
content/memo.路过就会多看一眼: When you pass by, you’ll take a second look
content/memo.多年未见的朋友来访: A friend I haven't seen for many years comes to visit.
content/memo.一起散步到河边: Take a walk to the river together
content/memo.还是很多话没说完: There's still a lot of words left unfinished
content/memo.临走前约好下次别隔太久: Before leaving, make an appointment not to be too long next time
content/memo.转凉后开始夜跑: Start running at night after it gets colder
content/memo.路灯一盏盏过去: The street lights pass by one by one
content/memo.回家后睡得踏实: Have a good sleep after returning home
content/memo.但留下不少可以回想的瞬间: But there are many memorable moments left behind
content/memo.傍晚去河边坐一会儿: Go sit by the river for a while in the evening
content/memo.远处有人放音乐: Someone is playing music in the distance
content/memo.水面有细碎的光: There are fragments of light on the water surface
content/memo.坐到天黑才回: Sit there until dark and then go back
content/memo.这是图片的说明文字: This is the caption for the image
content/memo.给远方朋友写了封信: Wrote a letter to a friend far away
content/memo.写到最后才发现: I didn’t find it until the end of writing
content/memo.很多话平时不会说: There are many things that I wouldn’t usually say
content/memo.寄出前又读了一遍: Read it again before sending it.
content/memo.周末去了附近小城: I went to a nearby town on the weekend
content/memo.贴在书桌前: Posted in front of the desk
content/memo.第一场雪下得很轻: The first snow fell very lightly
content/memo.站在窗前看了很久: I stood in front of the window and looked at it for a long time
content/memo.摆上常读的书: Put out the books you often read
content/memo.特地留了一层空位: A layer of space was specially left open
content/memo.夜里开一盏小灯坐一会儿: Turn on a small light and sit for a while at night
content/memo.久别的朋友聚在一起吃饭: Friends who have not seen each other for a long time get together for dinner
content/memo.但笑起来还是熟悉: But the smile is still familiar
content/memo.散场时心里很暖: I felt very warm when the show ended
